Name: Percentage of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all cases

Name: Number of times Plagiarism Originality Report Completed occurs before SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: Number of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where Plagiarism Originality Report Completed is followed by SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Frequency of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in variants that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed occurrences that are part of variants ending with a revision decision (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision, SW-EIC Minor Revision, or SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit)
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Number of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed events that occur after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and before any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Number of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' activities for cases where activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' occurs

Name: Percentage of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in relation to Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Frequency of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in variants that include Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded'

Name: Percentage of cases where Plagiarism Originality Report Completed appears exactly once per case
Metric: the average of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Number of variants in which Plagiarism Originality Report Completed is present
Metric: Number of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' activities

Name: Percentage of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed executions that are followed within 24 hours by SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Ratio of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Frequency of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in cases that ultimately result in acceptance (e.g., RW-EIC Accept or SW-EIC Accept)
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed that occurs before any AE assignment activity (e.g., SW-Awaiting AE Assignment or SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Number of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed events that are part of the most frequent variant pattern
Metric: Number of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' activities

Name: Percentage of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed relative to the total number of system-generated confirmation or completion activities (e.g., Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation, Manuscript Export Succeeded, SW-Checklist Completed)
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Frequency of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in variants that do not contain any reviewer reminder activities (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2)
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all cases where 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' does not happen

Name: Percentage of cases where Plagiarism Originality Report Completed directly follows Manuscript Export Succeeded without intermediate activities
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Ratio of variants containing Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to total number of unique variants
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Number of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed occurrences that precede any decision-making activity (e.g., SW-Awaiting EIC Decision, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Accept)
Metric: Number of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' occurs
